data.title: Anthology — Live Session Cover | Carla Morrison
data.description:
There are songs that simply grow with you, and this is one of them. Carla lends her voice to this timeless Shakira classic ...Una canción de cuna que con el tiempo se convirtió en el himno de amor incondicional de muchas familias. Este 10 de mayo, ..."Disfruto" reached 1 billion views, and we had to celebrate in a special way!!

Thank you for making my lyrics your own.

On ...
